title: Velvety Earthy Ukrainian Pear Stew
description: A cozy, kid-friendly Ukrainian stew that blends sweet pears with earthy vegetables into a silky, comforting bowl, perfect for any meal.

ingredients.name: Pears
ingredients.notes: Choose sweet varieties like Bosc or Anjou

instructions: Heat a large saucepan over medium heat; add a splash of oil if desired.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until translucent, about 4-5 minutes.
Stir in the minced garlic and cook for another 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add the diced carrots and pears, cooking for 3-4 minutes while stirring occasionally.
Pour in the vegetable broth and tomato paste, stirring to combine fully.
Sprinkle in smoked paprika, bay leaf, salt, and pepper; bring the mixture to a gentle simmer.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and let simmer for 18-20 minutes, or until the pears are tender and the flavors meld.
Remove the bay leaf, give the stew a final stir, and adjust seasoning if needed.
Garnish with chopped parsley before serving.
Serve warm with crusty bread or over cooked rice for a complete meal.
